scripts.cert:cii2019: python viewer/converters/scripts/cii_syntax_check_2019.py --input "Benchmarks/INPUT XML to CII 2019/BM_CII/AutojsongeneratedCII_BM_CII_INPUT.cii" --output "Benchmarks/INPUT XML to CII 2019/BM_CII/AutojsongeneratedCII_BM_CII_INPUT.ci.syntax_report.json"
scripts.cert:all: npm run test:vitest:cii-cert && npm run cert:cii2019 && npm run cert:cii2019:assert
